overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey depicting exploration of the Sanctuary of Olympia. The player character walks along ancient stone pathways past classical Greek structures, traverses a crowded ceremonial plaza with a large bronze statue, and enters a temple interior featuring red columns and stone benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone pathway approaching sanctuary entrance with ceremonial horse statues

events.description: passing the wooden shrine building with painted murals on the right
walking through the stone gate flanked by horse statues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path past the wooden shrine toward the sanctuary gate

entered.detail: small classical building with decorative painted murals and triangular pediment
life-sized white marble horse statue on stone pedestal
life-sized bronze horse statue on stone pedestal
wooden and stone gateway structure marking entrance to sanctuary
large classical temple with columns visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit stone pathway bordered by walls and trees. The camera moves forward past a wooden shrine building adorned with colorful murals, then proceeds through a gate flanked by imposing horse statues. The Temple of Olympia is visible in the distant background throughout the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sanctuary plaza with central statue and ceremonial braziers

events.description: exiting the narrow gate into the wide open sanctuary plaza
turning slightly right to navigate around the central bronze statue

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded plaza toward the main temple, navigating between groups of citizens and soldiers

notable_agents.action: group of citizens gathered near the central statue, some gesturing in conversation
two individuals in ancient Greek attire conversing beside a burning brazier

entered.detail: tall bronze statue of a robed figure on a stone pedestal with offerings
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the approach to the temple
stone fire pits with burning flames emitting smoke
purple fabric banners strung between columns and trees for decoration
rocky mountain peak visible behind the temple complex

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit plaza filled with scattered crowds. A large bronze statue stands prominently in the center while the Temple of Olympia looms larger on the left. The camera navigates through groups of NPCs dressed in ancient Greek clothing, passing burning ceremonial braziers and purple festival banners strung between the cypress trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple forecourt with grand staircase and fluted columns

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide stone staircase leading to the temple entrance
approaching the temple portico with tall fluted columns

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase of the temple, passing other visitors and guards

notable_agents.action: three individuals standing at the top of the steps near the temple entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading up to the temple entrance
tall cylindrical columns with vertical fluting supporting the temple portico
large rectangular planter with red and orange flowers

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the imposing Temple of Olympia and begins ascending its wide stone staircase. The grand portico with tall fluted columns comes into view as the plaza and bronze statue recede behind. A few NPCs stand near the entrance, and decorative planters with flowers flank the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior with red columns and stone benches

events.description: entering the dimly lit temple interior through the main doorway
moving deeper into the hall where light filters through small windows

agents.ego_description: entering the temple interior and walking between the red columns toward the inner sanctum

entered.detail: massive red-painted fluted columns supporting the wooden ceiling beams
stone seating arranged along both sides of the central aisle
large statue visible at the far end of the temple interior

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the temple doorway into a dimly lit interior space. Massive red columns line the central aisle, flanked by stone benches. The exterior light fades as the camera moves deeper into the sanctuary, where purple banners hang from the walls and a statue is visible at the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air approach through a bustling ceremonial plaza and into the shadowed depths of a grand temple. It begins on a sunlit stone pathway, moving past a mural-adorned wooden shrine and through a gate flanked by horse statues while the Temple of Olympia remains visible in the distance. As the path opens, the camera navigates a wide plaza filled with crowds, passing burning braziers and purple banners beneath cypress trees as a large bronze statue dominates the center. The scene then shifts toward the temple's imposing facade, ascending a wide stone staircase past decorative planters as the plaza recedes behind the towering fluted columns of the portico. Finally, the camera passes through the doorway into a dimly lit interior, where the bright exterior light fades to reveal massive red columns, stone benches, and purple banners lining the hall toward a distant statue.
